examples: Mr. Baruch dismisses that as petty and spiteful.
The princess came in, and as she passed by them she had something spiteful to say to every one.
The people can be wrong in an assortment of ways: lazy, spiteful, bullying or just dull and too depressed themselves to spread much cheer.
The union said the "spiteful and vindictive" suspension was linked to a bullying complaint Ms Griffiths lodged against a senior official.
Morne Morkel can drift in and out of games but can extract spiteful bounce at his best, and Rory Kleinvelt has looked steady in his appearances so far.
